properties.name: Pastasole
properties.description: Viral parmesan wheel pasta - fresh homemade pasta cooked in massive imported Italian parmesan wheels right in front of you at a street-side window. Plain fettuccine is $9.90. Most popular dish has mushrooms, caramelized onions, and truffle oil. Huge portions with massive amounts of parmesan cheese.
properties.address: 192 1st Ave, New York, NY 10009, USA

properties.name: Zucker's Bagels & Smoked Fish
properties.description: Breakfast bagels after Brooklyn Bridge walk.

properties.name: One World Observatory
properties.description: Incredible views of NYC skyline from above. Animation in lift as you go up, skyline revealed at the top. Highly recommended.

properties.name: Staten Island Ferry
properties.description: Completely free round trip with amazing views of Statue of Liberty. Ignore people selling excursions at the port.
properties.address: 4 Whitehall St, New York, NY 10004, USA

properties.name: LOS TACOS No.1
properties.description: Steak tacos and chicken quesadilla recommended. Great for lunch.
properties.address: 136 Church St, New York, NY 10007, USA

properties.name: Charging Bull
properties.description: Iconic Wall Street statue to walk by.
properties.address: Bowling Green, New York, NY 10004, USA

properties.name: New York Stock Exchange
properties.description: Historic building to see while walking around Financial District.
properties.address: 11 Wall St, New York, NY 10005, USA

properties.name: Ten Thousand Coffee
properties.description: Try the Einspänner (coffee drink). Great spot for afternoon coffee.
properties.address: 14 Wall St, New York, NY 10005, USA

properties.name: Roosevelt Island Tramway
properties.description: Scenic aerial tramway ride with views across New York. A unique way to experience the city from above.
properties.address: 254 E 60th St, New York, NY 10022, USA

properties.name: Pier 97 at Hudson River Park
properties.description: 2.5 acre waterfront oasis along the Hudson River with a massive sports field with blue turf, beautiful cabana area for skyline views, super fast adult slide with NYC in the background, and great sunset views
properties.address: Hudson River Greenway, New York, NY 10019, USA

properties.name: Pier 57 Rooftop Park
properties.description: Elevated free rooftop park with sweeping views of the Hudson River and NYC skyline. Access via elevator from the market level (hit button for 'park')
properties.address: 57 Hudson River Greenway, New York, NY 10011, USA

properties.name: Pier 35
properties.description: Giant swings overlooking the East River with sunset views of the Manhattan Bridge and Lower Manhattan
properties.address: FDR Dr, New York, NY 10002, USA

properties.name: Nowon East Village
properties.description: Korean-American fusion with a $49 prefix menu that includes: Caesar salad, choice of lamb or shrimp skewers, chicken, chopped cheese rice cakes (described as favorite dish in NYC), burger, and honey butter tots (described as best tater tots ever). Great for birthday dinners.
properties.address: 507 E 6th St, New York, NY 10009, USA

properties.name: The Metropolitan Museum of Art
properties.description: Suggested admission donation is pay-what-you-wish ($5-10 recommended). Multiple exhibits spanning different eras. Great for solo visits or groups. Sit on the iconic Met steps for people watching and Gossip Girl vibes.
properties.address: 1000 5th Ave, New York, NY 10028, USA

properties.name: American Museum of Natural History
properties.description: Museum featuring ocean exhibits, whales, and sea life displays
properties.address: 200 Central Prk W, New York, NY 10024, USA

properties.name: The Museum of Modern Art
properties.description: Modern art museum recommended as a date spot or solo visit. The video is specifically about visiting MoMA.
properties.address: 11 W 53rd St, New York, NY 10019, USA

properties.name: Louis Vuitton New York Saks Fifth Ave
properties.description: New Louis Vuitton flagship store described as a work of art, notable architecture worth visiting
properties.address: 611 5th Ave 1st floor 1st floor, New York, NY 10022, USA

properties.name: Colorful Natalie
properties.description: A dreamy, colorful shop perfect for girlie aesthetic shopping and souvenirs
properties.address: 247 Bleecker St, New York, NY 10014, USA

properties.name: The Clocktower
properties.description: Bar located on the second floor of the Edition Hotel next to Madison Square Park. Features 30-foot high ceilings covered with old photographs of celebrities, free pool table, well-poured drinks, and a bar menu with enough food to leave feeling full. Separate from the restaurant but serves delicious food. Great for dates or feeling fancy on a budget.
properties.address: 5 Madison Ave, New York, NY 10010, USA

properties.name: The New York EDITION
properties.description: Hotel next to Madison Square Park that houses The Clocktower Bar on its second floor.
properties.address: 5 Madison Ave, New York, NY 10010, USA

properties.name: SUMMIT One Vanderbilt
properties.description: Immersive observation experience atop One Vanderbilt skyscraper near Grand Central. Features glass-walled rooms, mirrored infinity spaces, and outdoor glass box skyboxes with stunning 360° views of the NYC skyline. Tickets are $60+ per person.
properties.address: 45 E 42nd St, New York, NY 10017, USA

properties.name: The High Line
properties.description: Elevated linear park built on a historic freight rail line on Manhattan's West Side. A 1.45-mile greenway with gardens, art installations, and stunning views of the Hudson River and city skyline. Free to visit.
properties.address: New York, NY 10011, USA

properties.name: Jellycat Diner at FAO Schwarz
properties.description: Interactive Jellycat pop-up experience inside FAO Schwarz where staff "cook" and "serve" plush Jellycat toys in a diner setting. You pick a plush, they prepare it with pretend grilling and plating, then bag it up for you. A fun, whimsical experience — great for gifts or Jellycat fans.
properties.address: 30 Rockefeller Plaza, New York, NY 10111, USA

properties.name: Pandora Times Square
properties.description: Pandora jewelry flagship store in Times Square. Great for picking up charms and bracelets as souvenirs or gifts.
properties.address: 110 W 42nd St, New York, NY 10036, USA

properties.name: The Woo Woo
properties.description: Underground speakeasy serving 80s vibes and craft cocktails, hidden beneath The Mean Fiddler in Times Square. Ring the doorbell to get in — you might need a password. Walk-in only after 9pm on Fri/Sat, reservations recommended otherwise. Website: https://www.thewoowoonyc.com/
properties.address: 266 W 47th St, New York, NY 10036, USA

properties.name: Kendra Scott
properties.description: Popular jewelry and accessories store in SoHo. Known for their colorful gemstone pieces and custom Color Bar experience where you can design your own jewelry.
properties.address: 126 Spring St, New York, NY 10012, USA

properties.name: Bad Roman
properties.description: Trendy Italian-American restaurant in the Shops at Columbus Circle. Known for their viral cacio e pepe, rigatoni vodka, and dramatic tableside presentations. Vibrant atmosphere and Instagram-worthy dishes.
properties.address: 3rd floor, 10 Columbus Cir, New York, NY 10019, USA

properties.name: Ellen's Stardust Diner
properties.description: Retro 1950s-themed diner where the singing waitstaff perform Broadway hits and pop songs while you eat. A fun, lively experience near Times Square — expect a queue but worth the wait for the atmosphere.
properties.address: 1650 Broadway, New York, NY 10019, USA

properties.name: Ambassador Theatre
properties.description: Historic Broadway theatre. We already have tickets to see Chicago here!
properties.address: 219 W 49th St, New York, NY 10019, USA

properties.name: LIC Manhattan View Hotel
properties.description: Our hotel for the trip! Located in Long Island City with views of the Manhattan skyline.
properties.address: 39-05 29th St, Long Island City, NY 11101, USA

properties.name: Central Park Zoo
properties.description: Compact zoo in the heart of Central Park featuring sea lions, penguins, snow leopards, and more. Great for a quick visit while exploring the park. Book tickets in advance: https://centralparkzoo.com/
properties.address: New York, NY 10021, USA

properties.name: Live By The Sword Tattoo
properties.description: Walk-in friendly tattoo shop in SoHo. Known for quality flash designs and a great spot to get a spontaneous NYC tattoo souvenir.
properties.address: 454 Broadway, New York, NY 10013, USA

properties.name: Canal & Bowery
properties.description: Canal and Bowery intersection landmark.
properties.address: New York, NY 10013, USA

properties.name: Edge NYC
properties.description: The highest outdoor sky deck in the Western Hemisphere at Hudson Yards. Features a thrilling glass floor section and angled glass walls for jaw-dropping views of the city skyline and Hudson River.
properties.address: 30 Hudson Yards, New York, NY 10001, USA

properties.name: ENLY
properties.description: Trendy cafe in Nolita known for beautifully crafted drinks and aesthetic interiors. A popular spot for matcha and specialty lattes.
properties.address: 227 Mott St, New York, NY 10012, USA

properties.name: Sunday Morning
properties.description: Cozy East Village cafe with a warm, relaxed vibe. Great for brunch and coffee.
properties.address: 29 Avenue B, New York, NY 10009, USA

properties.name: Macy's
properties.description: The iconic Macy's Herald Square flagship store — the largest department store in the world. Multiple floors of shopping near Times Square.
properties.address: 151 W 34th St., New York, NY 10001, USA
